case_title: GEORGIY KULYA VS. EUGENE BACHMANO et al

docket_entries.description: ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR MAR-01-2004 IN DEPARTMENT 212 AT 1:30 PM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). THE JAN-16-2004 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
MINI-MINUTES FOR MAR-01-2004 1:30 PM FOR DEPT 212

SANCTIONS ORDERED IN THE AMOUNT OF $350.00 AGAINST GEORGIY KULYA, FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT THE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING ON: MAR-01-2004, PAYABLE ON OR BEFORE MAR-17-2004. PROCEEDINGS REPORTED BY: PATTY LEE HUBBLE, CSR#3058. (212) NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR MAR-01-2004 CONTINUED TO MAY-03-2004 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 212 FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
MINI-MINUTES FOR MAY-03-2004 1:30 PM FOR DEPT 212

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR JUL-06-2004 CONTINUED TO SEP-07-2004 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 212 FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
MINI-MINUTES FOR SEP-07-2004 1:30 PM FOR DEPT 212

CASE DISMISSED AS TO ENTIRE ACTION BY COURT AT ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING SEP-07-2004 AT 1:30PM. THE COURT FINDS NO GOOD CAUSE OR SUBSTANTIAL JUSTIFICATION FOR FAILURE TO COMPLY WITH THE PREVIOUS COURT ORDERS. THE COURT FINDS THAT A LESS SEVERE SANCTION WOULD NOT BE EFFECTIVE IN LIGHT OF THE HISTORY OF FAILURE TO COMPLY WITH THE COURT'S ORDER. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

OTHER NON EXEMPT COMPLAINTS, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF KULYA, GEORGIY AS TO DEFENDANT BACHMANO, EUGENE KHARMATS, MARK KALAPATI, KATERINA DUBINSKY, DAN DOES 1-100, INCLUSIVE NO SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR JAN-16-2004 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  OCT-14-2003 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         DEC-31-2003
ADDED TO PROOF OF SERVICE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE CALENDAR HEARING SET FOR DEC-02-2003 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 212
MINI-MINUTES FOR DEC-02-2003 9:00 AM FOR DEPT 212

SANCTIONS OF $200.00 AGAINST GEORGIY KULYA, FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT THE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING ON: DEC-02-2003 PAYABLE ON OR BEFORE DEC-17-2003. PROCEEDINGS REPORTED BY: LETICIA PEREZ. (212) NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Sep-10-2004 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES: No appearances. The court having reviewed the file finds no good cause or substancial justification for plaintiff's failure to comply with the court's orders and rules. Therefore, It is hereby ordered that this matter is dismissed. The court finds that a less severe sanction would not be effective due to the history of lack of compliance. Proceedings reported by: Carlito Mandia, CSR 689. (212)

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jul-06-2004 Continued To Sep-07-04 At 01:30 P.M. In Dept 212
MINI MINUTES: No appearance. Plaintiff in Propria Persona is sanctioned $350.00, for failure to appear. The OSC is re-set to 9/7/2004 at 1:30 PM, in department 212. Proceedings reported by: Beldon Yee. (212)
